summary: RETEST after Q15 crash fix. Frontend e2e fully green. Completed full L1 (15 questions) without crash, l1-complete -> accept -> L2 dice/category/cards/question -> 120-char cap enforced -> handoff -> Player B answer -> l2-both-screen -> insights (6 cards) -> L3 teaser -> restart back to landing. Backend skipped per request (was 100% green previous iteration).
critical_code_review_comments: Fix in Level1Question.jsx is correct: `if (!q) return null;` before render and `if (!q) return;` in timer effect prevent the out-of-bounds crash. Bounds-checking guards the race between phase transition ('l1-both-final') and stale render of Level1Question after questionIndex increments to 15.
Optional defensive hardening (non-blocking): in gameStore L1_ANSWER reducer, no-op if questionIndex >= LEVEL_1_QUESTIONS.length to prevent double-dispatch from a final timer tick.
server.py /api/sessions/{id} returns 200 with null for missing sessions instead of 404 (carry-over hygiene issue from iteration_1; non-blocking for this retest).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Setup uses data-testid `setup-player1-input` and `setup-player2-input` (NOT setup-name-a/b). Landing button is `home-start-btn`. l1-locked and l1-both auto-advance via setTimeout — no continue button. After Q15, phase 'l1-both-final' shows l1-both-screen which auto-dispatches GO->'l1-complete'. The complete e2e playwright loop is captured and passes end-to-end.
rca_of_the_issue: Fix verified working: Level1Question.jsx now bounds-checks q before render (line 31) and timer effect (line 22). After Player B answers Q15, the brief moment where Level1Question re-renders with questionIndex=15 no longer crashes — component returns null and Game.jsx swaps in Level1BothAnswered(final=true), which auto-advances to l1-complete-screen after 1.4s.
